reason: Fix indentation: stateOf helper uses 4-space generator body, not 6-space
Fix indentation: fastestHappyPath helper uses 4-space generator body
Fix: PGlite Drizzle driver uses .execute() not .run() on insert builders
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/event/event-store.ts b/packages/opencode/src/event/event-store.ts
index d681e373af..4e1942cd14 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/event/event-store.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/event/event-store.ts
@@ -113,7 +113,7 @@ export const layer = Layer.effect(
 
     const record = Effect.fn("EventStore.record")(function* (event: RuntimeEvent) {
       const encoded = encodeForDb(event)
-      yield* adapter.query((db) => db.insert(RuntimeEventTable).values(encoded).run())
+      yield* adapter.query((db) => db.insert(RuntimeEventTable).values(encoded).execute())
       log.info("recorded", { id: event.id, type: event.eventType })
     })

reason: Fix: PGlite Drizzle driver uses .execute() not .all() on select builders
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/event/event-store.ts b/packages/opencode/src/event/event-store.ts
index d681e373af..6c3867acbe 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/event/event-store.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/event/event-store.ts
@@ -113,7 +113,7 @@ export const layer = Layer.effect(
 
     const record = Effect.fn("EventStore.record")(function* (event: RuntimeEvent) {
       const encoded = encodeForDb(event)
-      yield* adapter.query((db) => db.insert(RuntimeEventTable).values(encoded).run())
+      yield* adapter.query((db) => db.insert(RuntimeEventTable).values(encoded).execute())
       log.info("recorded", { id: event.id, type: event.eventType })
     })
 
@@ -128,7 +128,7 @@ export const layer = Layer.effect(
         if (where) q = q.where(where)
         q = q.orderBy(orderFn(RuntimeEventTable.ts))
         q = q.limit(limit).offset(offset)
-        return q.all() as Record<string, unknown>[]
+        return q.execute() as Promise<Record<string, unknown>[]>
       })

reason: Run PGlite migrations so runtime_events and other campaign tables exist before tests
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/test/fixture/pg.ts b/packages/opencode/test/fixture/pg.ts
index a971caed1a..78155d75e4 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/test/fixture/pg.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/test/fixture/pg.ts
@@ -32,6 +32,7 @@
 import { Effect, Layer, Schedule } from "effect"
 import { DatabaseAdapter } from "@/storage/adapter"
 import { Flag } from "@opencode-ai/core/flag/flag"
+import { readMigrationFiles } from "drizzle-orm/migrator"
 
 // ── Counter for unique schema / instance IDs ──────────────────
 
@@ -44,6 +45,31 @@ async function createPGliteAdapter(): Promise<DatabaseAdapter.Interface> {
   const { drizzle } = await import("drizzle-orm/pglite")
   const client = new PGlite()
   const db = drizzle({ client })
+
+  // Apply all migrations so runtime_events and other tables exist
+  const folder = new URL("../../migration-pg", import.meta.url).pathname
+  const migrations = readMigrationFiles({ migrationsFolder: folder })

reason: Fix: integer(32-bit) overflows with Date.now() milliseconds (~1.78T). Use bigint(64-bit).
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/storage/schema.pg.sql.ts b/packages/opencode/src/storage/schema.pg.sql.ts
index 878557cecb..294de36be3 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/storage/schema.pg.sql.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/storage/schema.pg.sql.ts
@@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
-import { integer } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core"
+import { bigint } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core"
 
 export const TimestampsPg = {
-  time_created: integer()
+  time_created: bigint({ mode: "number" })
     .notNull()
     .$default(() => Date.now()),
-  time_updated: integer()
+  time_updated: bigint({ mode: "number" })
     .notNull()
     .$onUpdate(() => Date.now()),
 }
